$comment: Motion extraction confidence thresholds. Used by validators and the convergence loop.

failureActions.low_confidence_easing: re-track at native FPS, try alternative tracking method
failureActions.low_confidence_duration: verify CFR normalization, check VFR flag
failureActions.low_confidence_position: try template matching if feature tracking failed (or vice versa)
failureActions.low_confidence_opacity: re-measure with tighter bbox crop around element
failureActions.low_confidence_spring: increase FPS to capture oscillation peaks, try 120fps if available
failureActions.low_confidence_scroll: isolate scroll segment, compute scroll velocity independently
failureActions.element_tracking_lost: re-detect element bbox via Gemini targeted crop, retry with larger search window
failureActions.bezier_residual_high: check for multi-phase animation (may need keyframes instead of single curve)
failureActions.spring_residual_high: verify overshoot detection, may be a CSS back() ease instead of true spring
